work_unit: SZ-SH-M-002: Source manifest lacks CSP; build.mjs adds wasm-unsafe-eval — dev/prod divergence
situation: Source manifest.json had no content_security_policy field. build.mjs Step 7 hardcoded entire dist manifest including CSP, causing dev (vite/npm run dev) and prod (node build.mjs) manifests to diverge. Dev mode would load extension without CSP, prod with CSP+wasm-unsafe-eval.
action: Added content_security_policy to source manifest.json. Rewrote build.mjs Step 7 to read source manifest and transform paths programmatically instead of hardcoding the entire object. This ensures CSP, permissions, name, description, version all stay in sync between source and dist.
outcome_evidence: Commit on auto/opt-shared-1783413612 pushed to origin. git diff shows manifest.json gains CSP field, build.mjs Step 7 reads+transforms source manifest instead of hardcoding. Pre-existing build failure (storage.ts export syntax) is unrelated — confirmed by reproducing on clean main.
next_suggestion: SZ-SH-M-003: esbuild minification without sourcemaps makes production debugging impossible
SZ-SH-M-005: preprocessForVL tests only cover passthrough path; compression branch untested
SZ-SH-M-006: @crxjs/vite-plugin beta dependency unused in actual build pipeline
